triples.subject: Visiting scholar
triples.object: In academia, a visiting scholar , visiting scientist , visiting researcher , visiting fellow , visiting lecturer , or visiting professor is a scholar from an institution who visits a host university to teach, lecture, or perform research on a topic for which the visitor is valued. triples.object: An academic conference or scientific conference (also congress , symposium , workshop , or meeting ) is an event for researchers (not necessarily academics) to present and discuss their scholarly work. triples.subject: NeurIPS
triples.object: The Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (abbreviated as NeurIPS and formerly NIPS )  is a machine learning and computational neuroscience conference held annually in December.
